ignoreCommand: if [[ "$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF" == *"dependabot"* ]]; then exit 0; fi; if [[ "$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF" == claude/* ]]; then exit 0; fi; ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel); BASE="${VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA:-HEAD^}"; git rev-parse "$BASE" >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 1; git diff --quiet "$BASE" HEAD -- "$ROOT/projects/analogue"
